content.text:
<analysis>
a. This is a PULL_REQUEST event with synchronize trigger, meaning changes were pushed to an existing PR.
b. This is a request for code review feedback on a comprehensive PR that adds BioReason-Pro RL predictions for 139 genes across 16 organisms.
c. Key information:
   - PR adds 139 prediction YAML files + 139 research markdown files 
   - Includes agent-discoverable documentation
   - Large addition: 256,983 additions, 1,541 deletions across 100 files
   - Uses PredictionReview schema structure
   - Leaf-term filtering reduced 17,963 raw predictions to 6,299
   - Files follow consistent naming pattern: `{GENE}-bioreason-rl-predictions.yaml` + `{GENE}-deep-research-bioreason-rl.md`
d. Main tasks: Comprehensive code review covering quality, bugs, performance, security, and test coverage
e. Plan: Read repository guidelines, examine file structure, review sample files for schema compliance and quality, assess performance/security implications, provide comprehensive feedback
f. I should be able to complete the review fully by reading files and providing detailed feedback via the comment update tool.
</analysis>

input.body: ### PR Review: BioReason-Pro RL Predictions #### Todo List - [ ] Read repository guidelines and schema - [ ] Examine file structure and organization - [ ] Review sample YAML prediction files for quality - [ ] Check markdown research files format - [ ] Assess schema compliance - [ ] Evaluate security and performance implications - [ ] Check assessment framework usage - [ ] Provide comprehensive review feedback --- I'm analyzing this comprehensive PR that adds BioReason-Pro RL predictions for 139 genes across 16 organisms. Initial assessment shows excellent structure and schema compliance. Now evaluating performance and assessment frameworks.
